calendar.matters:
Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The demurrer is off calendar. The San Francisco bench is recused. The Judicial Council assigned the case to Judge Jeffrey Brand, Alameda County. Please call his clerk to obtain a new hearing date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
